summary: p12-c001 waived (staging unavailable; goals.md fallback applies). p12-c002 is the only remaining change. Additional finding: docker.yml does not trigger on version tags — add tags: ['v[0-9]*'] as part of c002 so ghcr.io images are published automatically. c002 scope: docker.yml fix + Cargo.toml bump + CHANGELOG + tag + push + GitHub Release. Both OQs resolved.

docker.yml triggers only on branches — needs tags trigger for versioned images
Cargo.toml still at 0.10.0 — single-line bump to 1.0.0
git cliff preview clean — 4 user-facing feature/fix commits since v0.10.0
